testcase.name: test_06_driver_can_always_set_available
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_driver_availability_validation.py:45: in setup assert login_response.status_code == 200, f"Driver login failed: {login_response.text}" E AssertionError: Driver login failed: {"detail":"تم تجاوز الحد المسموح من الطلبات. يرجى الانتظار قليلاً.","retry_after":60} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
